reasoning_model_1: The model failed the negative constraint of the prompt to 'read this sentence'. Instead of synthesizing the provided text, the model hallucinated a completely new script based on the target persona. From 00:00 to 00:18, the spoken content ('I've totally gone through this project reports... fresh, energetic vibe...') is a slang-filled paraphrase of the original business text. While the textual style mimics a youthful persona, the Content Accuracy is rated at 0 because the voice content is clearly inconsistent with the required script. Consequently, the model fails to meet the basic requirement of the task.
reasoning_model_2: The model followed the instruction perfectly. From 00:00 to 00:15, it read the provided text verbatim ('I have carefully checked this project report...') with no pronunciation errors, omissions, or additions, satisfying the Content Accuracy criteria. The model successfully integrated the requested 'youthful voice' into the paralinguistic dimension (Age) by applying a younger timbre and energetic pacing to the formal text, rather than altering the text itself. The delivery is fluent, natural, and maintains the integrity of the original script while conveying the requested attribute.
model_comparison: The primary distinction lies in Content Accuracy. Model 1 interpreted the request 'read this sentence with a youthful voice' as a command to rewrite the text into a youthful vernacular, resulting in a complete failure to synthesize the correct script. This is a critical error in instruction following for a Text-to-Speech task. Model 2 correctly understood the assignment: it maintained the exact wording of the formal script while modulating the vocal characteristics (timbre, pitch) to sound youthful. Because Model 1 failed the fundamental Content Accuracy criterion (a score of 0), Model 2 is the clear winner.
